title: nymphaea odorata subsp. minor
intro: Nymphaea odorata subsp. minor, also known as the fragrant water lily, is a subspecies of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Nymphaeaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant's extracts have been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Nymphaea odorata subsp. minor can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical cream, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
